title: Booking settings
subtitle: Configure operational parameters that apply globally, with optional overrides per store

field.overrideOn: Overriding for this store — click to use the global setting
field.overrideOff: Using the global setting — click to override for this store

guideline.overrideMode: Viewing settings for {{store}}. Click the lock icon on any field to override its value for this store — leave it locked to fall back to the global setting.
